title: Decouple connector enable-signal from volume-mount-path emptiness; convert the 4 remaining dev-compose `${VAR:-default}` volume-mount substitutions to fail-loud SST

scenarios.title: SST emits non-empty repo-default host path when yaml is empty
scenarios.given: config/smackerel.yaml has `connectors.bookmarks.import_dir: ""` (empty) and no shell env override for BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR is set
scenarios.then: config/generated/dev.env contains the line `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=./data/bookmarks-import` (and equivalent SST-default emissions for MAPS_IMPORT_DIR / BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH / TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR)
linkedTests: manual: bash scripts/commands/config.sh --env dev → grep -nE '^(BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR|MAPS_IMPORT_DIR|BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH|TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR)=' config/generated/dev.env
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh new 4-block fallback resolution after yaml_get (BUG-029-005 / HL-RESCAN-012)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: removing the `if [[ -z ... ]]; then ... fi` fallback block for BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR causes the corresponding emission line to render with an empty value (`BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=`); restoration returns the non-empty repo-default

scenarios.title: Yaml value wins over SST repo-default
scenarios.given: config/smackerel.yaml has `connectors.bookmarks.import_dir: "/srv/data/bookmarks"` and no shell env override for BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR is set
scenarios.then: config/generated/dev.env contains the line `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=/srv/data/bookmarks` (yaml value preserved; SST default is NOT applied because the yaml value is non-empty)
linkedTests: manual: edit smackerel.yaml + bash scripts/commands/config.sh --env dev + grep dev.env
scenarios.redGreenProbe: inverting the fallback condition (apply repo-default even when yaml is non-empty) causes the operator's `/srv/data/bookmarks` value to be silently overwritten; the assertion catches the regression

scenarios.title: Shell env wins over yaml and SST repo-default
scenarios.given: config/smackerel.yaml has `connectors.bookmarks.import_dir: "/srv/data/bookmarks"` and the shell exports `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=/srv/exports/bookmarks` before invoking config.sh
scenarios.then: config/generated/dev.env contains the line `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=/srv/exports/bookmarks` (shell env wins over yaml; yaml wins over SST default)
linkedTests: manual: export BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR=... + bash scripts/commands/config.sh --env dev + grep dev.env
scenarios.specSource: scripts/commands/config.sh shell-env-overrides-yaml resolution order (preserved from pre-existing yaml_get semantics)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: swapping the resolution order to apply yaml_get unconditionally even when shell env is non-empty causes the operator's `/srv/exports/bookmarks` value to be silently overwritten; the assertion catches the regression

scenarios.title: Compose substitution GREEN against SST-emitted env file
scenarios.given: config/generated/dev.env contains non-empty values for the 4 mount-path vars (per SCN-029-005-A)
scenarios.when: `docker compose --env-file config/generated/dev.env -f docker-compose.yml config -q` runs (and same for test.env)
scenarios.then: it exits 0 (the new fail-loud `${X:?...}` substitution forms are satisfied by the SST-emitted env file); the sanctioned developer workflow `./smackerel.sh up` is unbroken
linkedTests: manual: docker compose --env-file config/generated/dev.env -f docker-compose.yml config -q
scenarios.specSource: docker-compose.yml fail-loud volume-mount substitution forms (BUG-029-005 / HL-RESCAN-012)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: removing one of the 4 SST-emitted mount-path lines from dev.env causes Compose to abort with the named-var error

scenarios.title: Compose fails loud when env file is missing or empty (RED proof of fail-loud)
scenarios.given: a developer invokes `docker compose --env-file /dev/null -f docker-compose.yml config -q` (no SST plumbing)
scenarios.when: Compose attempts variable substitution for the 4 volume-mount vars
scenarios.then: it exits non-zero; the error message names at least one of [BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR, MAPS_IMPORT_DIR, BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH, TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR] AS missing; the error message contains a fix-path token (e.g., `./smackerel.sh config generate` or `./smackerel.sh up`)
scenarios.specSource: docker-compose.yml fail-loud volume-mount substitution forms (BUG-029-005 / HL-RESCAN-012 / Gate G028)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: reverting any one of the 4 converted vars to `${X:-default}` form causes Compose to silently substitute the default instead of aborting (silent failure mode regresses)
scenarios.adversarial: YES — exits non-zero with a Compose error message naming at least one of the new fail-loud-substituted vars; relaxing any one of the 4 forms to `:-default` causes Compose substitution to silently succeed against the missing env file

scenarios.title: TestDevComposeContract_FailLoudVolumeMounts asserts live file has all 4 fail-loud forms with required attribution
scenarios.given: the live docker-compose.yml is bit-identical to the post-fix state
scenarios.then: it PASSes (all 4 volume-mount lines have `${X:?...}` form with error messages containing `Gate G028`, `HL-RESCAN-012`, and `./smackerel.sh config generate`); reverting any of the 4 to `${X:-...}` or `${X?...}` or bare `${X}` form causes the test to FAIL with a message naming the regressed var
scenarios.redGreenProbe: temporarily reverting `${BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR:?...}` to `${BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR:-./data/bookmarks-import}` in docker-compose.yml causes both TestDevComposeContract_FailLoudVolumeMounts (missing-fail-loud-form) AND TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks (unauthorized-fallback) to FAIL with named-var messages; restoration returns both to PASS
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if any of the 4 fail-loud forms is reverted to `:-` or `?` (no-colon) or bare `${X}` form

scenarios.title: TestComposeEnvOverrides_ContainerInternalConstants asserts the 4 env overrides are bare-literal
scenarios.given: the live docker-compose.yml is bit-identical to the post-fix state
scenarios.then: it PASSes (the 4 environment-block lines for BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR / MAPS_IMPORT_DIR / BROWSER_HISTORY_PATH / TWITTER_ARCHIVE_DIR are bare-literal `/data/<connector>` paths matching the AGENT_SCENARIO_DIR pattern); reverting any of the 4 to `${X:+/data/...}` or `${X:-/data/...}` form causes the test to FAIL
scenarios.redGreenProbe: temporarily reverting `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR: /data/bookmarks-import` to `BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR: ${BOOKMARKS_IMPORT_DIR:+/data/bookmarks-import}` causes the test to FAIL with a message naming the regressed var; restoration returns it to PASS
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if any of the 4 bare-literal forms is reverted to a `${X}` substitution

scenarios.title: TestConnectorStartupGate_BooleanIsSoleLoadBearingSignal asserts cmd/core/connectors.go drops the redundant `&& cfg.<X> != ""` clause
scenarios.given: cmd/core/connectors.go is bit-identical to the post-fix state
scenarios.then: it PASSes (zero occurrences of `BookmarksEnabled && cfg.BookmarksImportDir != ""`, `BrowserHistoryEnabled && cfg.BrowserHistoryPath != ""`, `MapsEnabled && cfg.MapsImportDir != ""`, `TwitterEnabled && cfg.TwitterArchiveDir != ""`); reintroducing any one of those patterns causes the test to FAIL
scenarios.specSource: cmd/core/connectors_startup_gate_test.go NEW static-file lint test (BUG-029-005 / HL-RESCAN-012)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: temporarily reverting `if cfg.BookmarksEnabled {` to `if cfg.BookmarksEnabled && cfg.BookmarksImportDir != "" {` causes the test to FAIL with a message naming the regressed pattern; restoration returns it to PASS
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if any of the 4 forbidden patterns is reintroduced in connectors.go

scenarios.title: TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks PASSes with empty allowlist
scenarios.given: the live docker-compose.yml is at its post-fix state AND devComposeDefaultFallbackAllowlist is empty (zero allowlisted vars)
scenarios.then: it PASSes (zero `${X:-default}` occurrences in the live file — the BUG-029-003 sweep is now complete)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: temporarily reverting any one of the 4 mount-path vars to `${X:-default}` form causes the test to FAIL with a Gate G028 violation message naming the regressed var
scenarios.adversarial: NO (positive empty-allowlist canary against live file)

scenarios.title: Pre-existing dev-compose adversarial tests from BUG-029-003 continue PASS GREEN with empty-allowlist semantics
scenarios.given: the changes from this fix are applied
scenarios.then: TestDevComposeContract_NoUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks PASSes (positive canary); TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialUnauthorizedDefaultFallback PASSes (the 4 BUG-029-003 sub-cases all still work); TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialAllowlistRespected PASSes (updated to use synthetic non-allowlisted vars on both sides — still proves per-var-not-per-line gating); TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialCommentLinesIgnored PASSes (no change required)
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go pre-existing BUG-029-003 tests + updated AdversarialAllowlistRespected fixture (BUG-029-005)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: removing the per-var allowlist filter from findDevComposeUnauthorizedDefaultFallbacks causes TestDevComposeContract_AdversarialAllowlistRespected to FAIL — the test still exercises the same gating logic even though the allowlist itself is empty (the fixture injects rogue vars that must be caught)

scenarios.title: Prod-compose contract tests preserved (BUG-042-001..005 canary)
scenarios.given: the changes from this fix are applied
scenarios.then: all 9 pre-existing prod-compose tests (TestComposeContract_LiveFile + 8 adversarials) PASS unchanged — this fix is purely additive against a different file (`docker-compose.yml`), so the canaries cannot regress as a side effect
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go pre-existing spec 042 + BUG-042-001..005 contract (preserved unchanged)
scenarios.redGreenProbe: no change is made to deploy/compose.deploy.yml or internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go in this fix; any regression in either file would fail one of the 9 prod-compose tests
scenarios.adversarial: YES (canaries — pre-existing BUG-042-001..005 adversarial tests preserved)

scenarios.title: Fresh-clone bootstrap: `.gitkeep` files preserve fail-loud Compose substitution out-of-the-box
scenarios.given: a fresh `git clone` of the smackerel repo
scenarios.when: the developer runs `./smackerel.sh config generate --env dev` then `./smackerel.sh up`
scenarios.then: the 4 host paths exist on disk (`./data/bookmarks-import/`, `./data/maps-import/`, `./data/browser-history/History/`, `./data/twitter-archive/`); `docker compose config -q` exits 0; the 4 volume mounts bind to existing-but-empty directories without permission errors
linkedTests: manual: git ls-files data/bookmarks-import/ data/maps-import/ data/browser-history/History/ data/twitter-archive/
scenarios.redGreenProbe: removing any one of the 4 `.gitkeep` exception lines from .gitignore causes `git status` to mark the corresponding `.gitkeep` file as ignored; removing the `.gitkeep` files themselves causes a fresh clone to omit the directories
